subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the realm of the unseen unto the realm of the seen, that none may bear witness save that which God did witness ere the creation of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الغیب الی الشهود لئلا یشهد الا بما شهد الله قبل خلق الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @twin Manifestations, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
